comments.data_directory: Path to Chemstation DATA directory containing .D folders
comments.output_directory: Where to save results (null = auto create in data_directory)
comments.rel_height: Relative height for width calculation (0.5 = FWHM)
comments.target_retention_times: List of specific RTs to search for, e.g., [2.5, 5.8, 10.2]
comments.rt_tolerance: Tolerance for matching target RTs in minutes
